description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a matte green and black color scheme. It is equipped with a telescopic scope mounted on the top rail, enhancing its accuracy for long-range targeting. The rifle has a collapsible stock at the rear, a detachable box magazine with a ribbed grip, and a prominent pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The barrel is relatively short and ends with a simple muzzle, lacking any visible advanced muzzle device. The receiver and handguard are robust, with angular lines and a utilitarian appearance. The overall build suggests a weapon designed for urban or close-quarters scenarios, prioritizing maneuverability and modularity.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a green and black finish, telescopic scope, collapsible stock, and detachable box magazine. Designed for urban use, it features ergonomic grips and a compact barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the collapsible stock, scope, pistol grip, and ribbed magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel end, scope lens, and the narrow profile of the handguard and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the scope, magazine, and the details of the receiver and handguard.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock, scope alignment, and the back of the receiver.
